ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_data" (
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "lane_1_flow" INTEGER /* Vehicle flow in lane 1 (vehicles per 5 minutes) */,
  "lane_1_speed" REAL /* Average speed in lane 1 (miles per hour) */,
  "lane_2_flow" INTEGER /* Vehicle flow in lane 2 (vehicles per 5 minutes) */,
  "lane_2_speed" REAL /* Average speed in lane 2 (miles per hour) */,
  "total_flow" INTEGER /* Total vehicle flow across both lanes (vehicles per 5 minutes) */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed across both lanes (miles per hour) */,
  "lane_points" INTEGER /* Number of lane data points observed */,
  "observed_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of observed data points */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestamp")
)

CREATE TABLE "lane_data" (
  "lane_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane data entry */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number */,
  "flow" INTEGER /* Vehicle flow (vehicles per 5 minutes) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed (miles per hour) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lane_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_flow" (
  "flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flow data entry */,
  "total_flow" INTEGER /* Total vehicle flow across all lanes (vehicles per 5 minutes) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the flow data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_speed" (
  "speed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speed data entry */,
  "average_speed" REAL /* Average speed across all lanes (miles per hour) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the speed data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lane_points" (
  "point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lane point data entry */,
  "lane_number" INTEGER /* Lane number */,
  "points_observed" INTEGER /* Number of data points observed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the lane points were recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observed_data" (
  "observed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observed data entry */,
  "observed_percentage" INTEGER /* Percentage of observed data points */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the observed data was recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* The date when the sensor was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* The date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., camera, radar) */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Calibration status of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident started */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the incident ended */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the incident report */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was filed */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the incident occurred */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., traffic analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the alert was issued */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert is relevant */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_recipients" (
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipient */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the alert is relevant */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather condition */,
  "construction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the construction activity */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident */,
  "impact_score" INTEGER /* Impact score of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_recipients_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "external_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of external data (e.g., weather, construction) */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* The timestamp of when the external data was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data */,
  "confidence_score" INTEGER /* Confidence score of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("external_id")
)
